summary: P0 blockers #972 and #973 are CLOSED — sprint path unblocked. state.json was stale and has been corrected. Sprint now resumes on #955 (Go kernel wire-up). Health remains YELLOW due to bloated open PR count (10 open, budget is 3) and a pattern of agents creating overlapping Prettier-fix PRs (#1094, #1095) that compete for the same files. PR #1098 is nearly green (lint only). Docs PRs #1091/#1092 need owner review before merge. No P0/P1 labeled issues currently open.

prs.title: fix(adapters): educate mode always allows regardless of suggestion presence
prs.note: Closes #1026. Lint + test-and-build failing. Needs fix before merge.

prs.title: feat(storage): parse driver:agent identity format, add driver_type to sessions
prs.note: Closes #1034. Only lint (Prettier) failing. A format fix would make this mergeable.

prs.title: chore(kernel-qa): QA cycle + fix Prettier regressions
prs.note: QA cycle report. test-and-build failing. Overlaps with #1094 on Prettier targets — likely a stale-base conflict.

prs.title: chore: fix Prettier formatting violations to unblock CI
prs.note: Closes #1050. lint passes but test-and-build fails. Overlaps with #1095 — one of these should be closed.

prs.title: docs: sync documentation with codebase state (2026-03-27)
prs.note: Docs-only. No code CI required. Needs owner review before merge.

prs.title: docs: sync documentation with codebase
prs.note: Docs-only. Overlaps with #1092 on same files. Owner should pick one and close the other.

prs.title: test: add tests for telemetry/runtimeLogger
prs.note: +16 tests. CI pending — await checks before review.

prs.title: chore(roadmap): triage backlog
prs.note: Roadmap/docs triage. lint + test-and-build failing — likely stale base. Needs rebase.

prs.title: feat(telemetry): add driverType field to AgentEvent wire format
prs.note: Closes #1031. CI pending — await checks. Relates to #1098 (same driver_type concept).

prs.title: test(storage): add coverage for agentId, agent helpers, v5 migration
prs.note: +63 tests. lint + test-and-build failing — stale base. Needs rebase.

prBudget.note: 10 open PRs across all squads/agents — exceeds per-squad budget of 3. Not all are kernel-owned but the repo-wide count is a concern. Most are from swarm agents (QA, docs-sync, copilot-test-writer).

triage.reprioritizationReason: P0 blockers #972 and #973 are closed. Resuming #955 (Go kernel wire-up) and #957. Sprint goal updated.

nextWork.note: Resume Go kernel wire-up (#955) and companion issue #957. P0 path is clear.

flaggedForArchitect.concern: Overlapping Prettier-fix PRs (#1094 vs #1095) and duplicate docs-sync PRs (#1091 vs #1092). Swarm agents are creating redundant PRs that bloat the queue and cause CI conflicts. Consider rate-limiting agent PR creation.
#1087 (telemetry driverType) and #1098 (storage driverType) implement the same concept independently. Should be reviewed together for consistency before merge.

metrics.notes: issuesClosed counts #972 and #973 which closed since last EM run.

escalationRules.notes: 2+ PRs failing CI triggers yellow health. Persistent blocker rule NOT triggered (previous P0s resolved within one EM cycle, not persisting across 2 runs). No governance denials.
